Off Calendar Mar-21-2018 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-01-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Janet Boessenecker for San Francisco Public Administrator.

The Court stated that it seems the Testator was trying to provide for Matthew, but there was no special needs trusts at the time. The Court granted the First and Final Account and Report of Successor Administrator, etc. (subject to review of the order). Status on filing of a copy of the order and the executed trust with a new trust case number is set for March 21, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Aug-15-2016 Continued To Oct-17-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Irene Barrese for petitioner GCharles McMillan.

Ms. Barrese stated that she had been trying to get Mr. McMillan to file for conservatorship of his son, who has Down Syndrome. She has also been working with him to complete the petition for final distribution, and requested that the court grant a continuance to have time for its completion. The status hearing was continued to October 17, 2016 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Chan. (Not reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-25-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Irene Barrese for Charles McMillan.

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and letters testamentary (subject to review of written order). Bond in the amount of $701,000.00 is required. The will is admitted to Probate.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Nancy Bautista/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Whitehead.
